personalInfo.name: Omar Mohammed Elsaadany
personalInfo.title: Mobile Developer
personalInfo.description: I build scalable mobile applications using Flutter and Android Native with Clean Architecture and modern backend integrations.
personalInfo.about:
Mobile Developer with hands-on experience in Flutter and Android Native (Kotlin, Jetpack Compose).
Experienced with Clean Architecture, MVVM, MVI, and Cubit/BLoC.
Built multiple real-world mobile applications integrated with REST APIs, SQLite, and responsive UI design.

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.description: Building high-performance, cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and Dart with clean architecture.

services.title: API & Backend Integration
services.description: Seamlessly integrating REST APIs, Firebase, and Supabase to provide robust backend solutions and real-time data.

services.title: UI/UX Implementation
services.description: Translating complex designs into beautiful, responsive, and interactive user interfaces with smooth animations.

services.title: App Optimization
services.description: Improving app performance, fixing bugs, and ensuring smooth user experiences through rigorous testing and debugging.

expertiseDetails.title: Problem Solver
expertiseDetails.desc: Turning complex problems into elegant code.

expertiseDetails.title: Performance
expertiseDetails.desc: Optimized apps for smooth 60/120 FPS experience.

projects.title: Mishkah
projects.description: A comprehensive Islamic mobile application providing Quran, Hadith, prayer times, Adhkar, Qibla direction, Tafsir, Islamic library, Zakat calculator, quizzes, and personalized daily worship tools. Supports Arabic and English with audio Quran, customization options, and a user-friendly experience for daily Islamic practice.

projects.title: DropZ
projects.description: Flutter-based e-commerce and delivery app allowing users to browse products, place orders, and track deliveries in real time with secure checkout and notifications.

projects.title: ServFix
projects.description: Graduation project built using Kotlin. A platform connecting users with skilled service providers such as carpenters, electricians, and technicians with booking, provider profiles, ratings, and real-time availability.

projects.title: Fit Track
projects.description: Fitness tracking application that helps users monitor workouts, create personalized workout plans, track progress analytics, and set reminders.

projects.title: Cinema App
projects.description: Movie browsing and ticket reservation application where users can view current and upcoming movies, reserve tickets, buy snacks, and manage a watchlist.
